chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-278 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.278/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2026 Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G Sindh for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sultan, advocate for respondent No.1 a/w respondent No.1. = After arguing the matter at length, both the learned counsel, under the instructions, state that they would be satisfied if the matter is remanded back to the trial court for decision on merits strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, the impugned Order dated 02.02.2023 passed in Civil Revision No.10/2022 by the learned District Judge, Tharparkar @ Mithi is set-aside and the application under Section 12 CPC filed by the Government is allowed by consent of the parties with direction to the learned trial court to allow complete opportunity of a fair trial to the Petitioner and conclude the trial within a period of 90 days from the date of receipt of this Order, whereby no unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to any of the parties. The copy of the Judgment be submitted by the learned trial court with the Additional Registrar of this Court for compliance. The petition alongwith pending application stands disposed of in the above terms with no order as to costs. JUDGE *Faisal *
